TaskFlow
BYOD · Serverless · Google Drive Native

Store every team task
in Google Drive

Your data lives in your own Drive — no central server. Kanban board and spreadsheet stay in perfect two-way real-time sync.

🔒 scope: drive.file — only accesses files this app creates
